question: Will the US attack Iran's infrastructure before June 1st?
evidence: U.S. military conducted airstrikes in southern Iran on May 25, 2026, targeting missile sites and boats.
Iran condemned the U.S. strikes as a display of 'bad faith' amid ongoing negotiations.
Diplomatic talks are ongoing, with Pakistan's Field Marshal Asim Munir in Tehran to mediate a peace deal.
President Trump postponed a planned military strike on Iran at the request of Gulf allies.
The U.S. military conducted 'self-defense' strikes in southern Iran on May 25, 2026, targeting missile launch sites and boats.
Iran condemned the U.S. airstrikes as a violation of good faith amid ongoing negotiations.
Diplomatic talks are ongoing, with Pakistan's Field Marshal Asim Munir in Tehran to mediate a peace deal.
President Trump postponed a planned military strike on Iran at the request of Gulf allies.
